title: Annual Leave Entitlement and Booking Vacation
text:
Q: What is my annual leave entitlement and how do I book vacation?
A: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid annual leave per year, accrued at a rate of 1.67 days per month. To book your vacation, please submit a leave request through the HR portal at least four weeks in advance of your desired leave dates. This allows for adequate planning and ensures that your absence does not disrupt team operations. Once your request is submitted, your manager will review and approve or deny the request within five business days. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com. Remember, unused leave can be carried over to the next year, but must be used within 18 months of the end of the leave year. Plan your vacations accordingly to maximize your time off!
